name: Atmos™ Rewards Visa Signature® Business Card
title: Atmos™ Rewards Visa Signature® Business Card (Bank of America)
text:
Card: Atmos™ Rewards Visa Signature® Business Card (Bank of America)
Best for Alaska loyalists
Pros: Ability to earn annual Companion Fare after $6,000 in yearly spend within the prior anniversary year,Free checked bag for any cardholder and up to 6 guests on the same reservation,Preferred boarding on Alaska Airlines flights,$100 off an annual Alaska Lounge+ Membership purchased with your card,10% rewards bonus for eligible Bank of America® business account holders,No foreign transaction fees
Cons: Companion Fare requires significant annual spend,Airline perks mainly benefit Alaska Airlines flyers,No ability to transfer points
Why we chose it: The Atmos™ Rewards Visa Signature® Business Card is built for small business owners who frequently fly Alaska or Hawaiian Airlines. The card offers a compelling welcome bonus, ongoing Companion Fare opportunities and valuable airline perks like free checked bags, preferred boarding and inflight discounts. With bonus rewards in categories like gas, transit and shipping (plus an annual 10% rewards boost for qualifying Bank of America® business account holders), this card is a strong value pick for businesses with travel needs.
Who it's good for: This card is a great fit for business owners who frequently fly with Alaska Airlines or Hawaiian Airlines, as well as companies that regularly book employee travel. It’s also a smart option for cardholders with a Bank of America® business banking relationship, thanks to the added reward bonus. If you’re looking for airline perks without the high annual fee that typically comes with premium travel cards, this one is worth considering.
Annual fee: $70 for the company and $25 per card
Recommended credit: 740-850
Rewards: 1 - 3X points
Intro bonus: Get 70,000 bonus points and a $99 Companion Fare (plus taxes and fees from $23) after you make $4,000 or more in purchases within the first 90 days of opening your account.
Points valuation: 1.5
Limited time: Limited-Time Offer
APR: 19.49% - 27.49% Variable APR on purchases and balance transfers,19.49% - 27.49% Variable APR on purchases and balance transfers,27.74% Variable APR for Cash Advances and Convenience Checks
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/reviews/alaska-airlines-visa-business-card-review/
